mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_ad_feedback (user_id, project_id, portrait_snapshot, feedback, exposure_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{projectId}, #{portraitSnapshot}, #{feedback}, #{exposureCount})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_ad_feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY project_id
SELECT * FROM user_ad_feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_ad_feedback SET exposure_count = exposure_count + 1, first_exposure_time = COALESCE(first_exposure_time, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND project_id = #{projectId}
